raw_text: alicia cervera sánchez 28014 madrid, spain +34 629 959 306 egyac8o nottingham.ac.uk career university of nottingham bachelor degree in aerospace engineering nottingham, uk sept. 2020-jan.2024 certifications flight laboratory course (nflc) cranfield university, uk may. 2022 professional resume creative and passionate aerospace engineering student with strong background in the field and expertise in the design, analysis/simulation, and development of aerospace systems and components as well as specialization in satellites and space mission design for biomedical purposes, with great leadership skills. devoted to the advancement of technology in the aerospace sector and space exploration. professional experience electrical design engineer ferchau engineering, getafe february2024-currently - design electrical systems installations according to the procedures of airbus defence & space. -catia v5 electrical modules. definition, development, integration and installation of electrical systems (ata92). customer: airbus defence and space experience in academic projects e landing gear design project e engineering dissertation (design and implementation of an hermetic box for space biomedical payload). the research project aimed to design and implement an hermetic container specifically tailored for transporting biomedical cargo in the challenging environment of space. the container ensured the preservation and protection of sensitive microbiological warms from the space temperature and pressure overall the entire mission (the university of nottingham-wormsail). this project encompassed the entire process, from conceptual design and material selection to testing and validation, within all the systems and subsystems required within the cubesat. e aerospace glider design project e aerospace satellite design project e earth observation cubesat mission and system preliminary design for risk mitigation of hazardous climate areas (telecommunication systems, radio navigation systems and tt&c system implementation) skills languages native spanish and c1 english technical aerodynamics for vehicle design flow distribution and performance (formula student team) engineering design: computer aided design (cad), advanced catia finite element analysis (fea): ansys, abaqus programming: matlab simulation tools: simulink, nastran/ patran orbit simulator: orbitus ed, satellite orbit simulator space systems engineering and knowledge of ecss standards experiences abroad e intensive summer in toronto (canada) 2016 summer e study year abroad in pennsylvania (usa) 2017/2018
